channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Motorbike parked on disabled parking, 28th March
item.description:
Individual leaving in flat 34 leaving his motorbike parked several times in disabled parking ,obstructing parking for suitable users and occupying excessive space not allocated for motorcycles. Episodes happening since 2 weeks .

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Priors Mead, Enfield
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping in rubbish bin, 28th March
item.description:
Fly tipping in 9 Bell Yard Mews rubbish bin. Name on fly tipping says Jaz Macdonald se1 3Ty
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 7, Bell Yard Mews, Old Kent Road, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytipping outside NISA Barry Road, 28th March
item.description:
Flytipping Barry Road to be cleared asap

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 38, Barry Road, East Dulwich, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: The roundabout at the bottom of Gravel hill has lots of some chips that need to sweep and cleared, 28th March
item.description:
Sine the roundabout has been resurfaced there is now a lot of lose stone chipping that require to sweeper and cleared as they could cause damage to a vehicle or a car windscreen. *** Also thanks for repaired the road surface at the top of gravel hill
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Queens Road, North End, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytipping Barry Road to be cleared asap, 28th March
item.description:
Flytipping Barry Road to be cleared asap

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 68, Barry Road, East Dulwich, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Pavement, grass road littered with what’s left from car colliding with bus stop. And oil and petrol and sand. It all needs to be cleaned properly please. It’s a mess. I had a text saying it has been done and as you can see, it hasn’t., 28th March
item.description:
Please can it be properly cleaned up.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Hayes Lane, Shortlands, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Recycling bins not emptied, 28th March
item.description:
Recycling wheelie bins not emptied this week
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Parish Wharf, Woolwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Deep trench lines, 28th March
item.description:
There’re two very deep trench lines causing significant dip and vehicles to brake hard after hitting it. That can cause accidental chain reaction in braking and can lead to accidents.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 169, Cromwell Road, Earl's Court, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish dumped high amount, 28th March
item.description:
Rubbish dumped
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Felixstowe Road, Edmonton
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Outside 34, 28th March
item.description:
As always, it seems residents of this property consider the pavement their rubbish tip. This time they have disposed of a various items on the pavement as detailed in the photo.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): The Avenue, London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Fly-tip Large - More than a van load

item.title: At the junction just pass the traffic lights there is a very large and deep pothole, 28th March
item.description:
The pothole near this junction requires some urgent attention for all road users and cyclists. I see it has been reported a few times already and no action or inspection of the pothole and been done, there is no blue markings to indicate that it has been investigated
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Queens Road, North End, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Household rubbish, 28th March
item.description:
As above

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Longleigh Lane, Bexleyheath
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: One tree already fallen into my neighbours garden., 28th March
item.description:
I reported this issue 2 years ago and nothing was done, it has over 30 per cent ash die back. It is a disaster waiting to happen. The trees back onto our properties No.s 17, 19 and 21 Woodland Way.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Woodland Way, West Heath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Construction waste, 28th March
item.description:
Construction waste

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Cameron Close, Edmonton
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Mattress, 28th March
item.description:
Mattress

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Cameron Close, Edmonton
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bins overflowing rubbish on streets, 28th March
item.description:
The bins on both sides of Manor Way Beckenham between Greenways and Kelsey Park Road are both full and overflowing. Rubbish has started to blow along Manor Way. Hasn't been emptied for days.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 2, Manor Way, Beckenham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Damaged tree and street light, 28th March
item.description:
Outside 100-116 Portland Street not a tree and street light have been damaged and are dangerous. It looks like it follows an accident. The tree trunk has a massive crack in it. The street light is bent and the light may fall down.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Walworth, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Diy/trade flytipping, 28th March
item.description:
Assorted Timber carpet rubbish dumped next to Kershaw house on York hill estate

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 1, Lansdowne Hill, West Norwood, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: General rubbish, 28th March
item.description:
General rubbish on grass verge near number 1 Cray Avenue and along kerbside at the end of St Andrew’s Drive

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Lower Road, Poverest, Orpington, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Renovation rubbish dumped near street, 28th March
item.description:
The issue occurred earlier today, on the corner of crystal palace park road and Lawrie park Road. People have left their rubbish at the border of the street and our property, fly tipping illegally. Their name and address is shown on the photo.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Crystal Palace Park Road, Crystal Palace, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
